signals.headline: On **December 10, 2025**, Powell attributed **most** of the inflation overshoot above 2% PCE target to Trump's tariffs (
signals.raw:
On **December 10, 2025**, Powell attributed **most** of the inflation overshoot above 2% PCE target to Trump's tariffs (goods inflation up), while cutting rates by 25bps to 3.5-3.75%; he expected tariff effects to be short-lived, with underlying inflation in low 2% range.[2]

signals.headline: On **April 16, 2025**, Powell warned that Trump's "significantly larger than anticipated" tariffs would cause **higher i
signals.raw: On **April 16, 2025**, Powell warned that Trump's "significantly larger than anticipated" tariffs would cause **higher inflation and slower growth**, noting elevated near-term inflation expectations tied to tariffs; he referenced upcoming Q1 GDP data suggesting slowed growth due to strong imports ahead of tariffs, with PCE inflation at 2.3% (total) and 2.6% (core) as of March 2025.[1][3]

Bitcoin Surges Past $75,000 on Institutional ETF Demand | YES | HIGH confidence**

Bitcoin has broken through the $75,000 resistance level in mid-April 2026, driven by record institutional demand through spot Bitcoin ETFs[9]. This represents a critical technical breakout that captured significant market attention, with BTC posting its strongest weekly gain since October[9].
